title: Binance Funding Contrarian Scientific Collaboration 15
thesis: Exploit funding extremes, regime shifts, and cross-science features to improve directional funding trades. This variant fuses statistical physics researcher guidance with network/epidemiology researcher, microstructure researcher to test phase-transition detection and cascade susceptibility before dislocations accelerate; contagion paths, information spread, and lag propagation across correlated books; order-book stress, queue pressure, and execution-quality asymmetry.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
